links.context: Law, yet "dishonor God through breaking the law" ([[ROM.2:23]]). The righteous men (vv. 45-49) typify the apostles, who preached to both Jew and Gentile ([[ROM.3:30]]). 24:1-14
fulfilled (see [[ROM.3:29]]-31; 4:13-16; [[GAL.4:21]]-31; all of Hebrews but especially 12:18-29; [[1PE.2:4]]-10; [[REV.21:9]]-27).
